description: Perform an IEC 62304-compliant software dependency audit of the OpenICE platform using the source code repository at /opt/openice/mdpnp/. Document the modular structure, third-party dependencies (SOUP), and build configuration in a report at /home/ga/Desktop/openice_dependency_audit.txt. The report must include five sections: 1. Project Module Structure (listing modules from settings.gradle), 2. Key Third-Party Dependencies (listing major libraries from build.gradle files), 3. DDS Middleware Identification (vendor and library), 4. Build System Summary (Gradle wrapper and Java versions), and 5. SOUP Risk Classification (classifying at least 3 identified dependencies as High, Medium, or Low risk).
